reviews.comment:
Excelente atención del Sr Diego del ACÁ CORRIENTES CAPITAL POR 25 de mayo . Atento a cualquier requerimiento de nosotros cuando vamos a la hermosa ciudad de Formosa .saludos Irma y julio

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from Mr. Diego at the ACÁ Corrientes Capital branch on 25 de Mayo. He was attentive to our every need when we visited the beautiful city of Formosa. Greetings, Irma and Julio

reviews.comment:
Muy Bueno todo , la atenciòn de los playeros y sobre todo las chicas que atienden el Full. La unica queja mia y noté la misma molestia en algunos clientes es que en el Full no disponen de bolsitas para las compras , adquirimos varias cosas y las tuvimos que llevar en las manos , haciendo malabarismo por que no te proveen de bolsas para las compras

(Translated by Google)
Everything was great, the service from the beach attendants and especially the girls who work at the convenience store. My only complaint, and I noticed the same annoyance among other customers, is that the convenience store doesn't provide shopping bags. We bought several things and had to carry them in our hands, juggling them because they don't provide shopping bags.
